business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial property ownership and leasing, including warehouse and manufacturing facilities

coverages_discussed.notes: 2024 policy CP00007001, no claims, no cancellation

positives: Stable carrier history with major national insurers
concerns: One claim reported in 2021 under Hartford Financial Services policy
Location LOC-008 (Uniontown, OH) has no ownership/lease designation specified
Multiple carrier changes over the last 4 years
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: One claim in 2021; zero claims in 2022, 2023, and 2024. No cancellations across all prior years.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Buckeye Industrial Properties, LLC operates a portfolio of 9 industrial locations across Ohio, including warehouse, manufacturing, and office occupancies totaling approximately 1,948,500 square feet. The majority of locations are leased, with one owned property in Toledo.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Operations include warehouse facilities (LOC-001, LOC-002, LOC-003, LOC-005, LOC-006, LOC-008), manufacturing facilities (LOC-004, LOC-007), and corporate office (LOC-009). Locations are concentrated in Columbus, Brooklyn, Dayton, Cincinnati, Toledo, and Uniontown, Ohio.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior 4-year loss history shows a single claim in 2021 while insured with Hartford Financial Services. No claims reported in 2022 (Chubb), 2023 (Hartford), or 2024 (Liberty Mutual). No policy cancellations.
